benefits.description: Initial 10mg vial worked amazing for appetite suppression over 5 weeks

side_effects.description: After 5 weeks of second 20mg vial, user started getting really hungry and doubted efficacy

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg/week using 10mg vial for 5 weeks with good results. Switched to 20mg vial, experienced loss of appetite suppression effect after 5 weeks and discarded remaining half-bottle. Obtained fresh vial which worked as expected. User notes Reta stability lasts closer to 5 months post-reconstitution rather than the commonly cited 1 month.
